# Ye workflow tab trigger hoga jab main branch pe push hoga
name: CI/CD Pipeline - Swaran Bot

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  # Job 1: Code quality check
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      # GitHub se code checkout karo
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      # Python setup karo
      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.10'

      # Dependencies install karo
      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: |
          cd backend
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      # Syntax errors check karo
      - name: Check Python Syntax
        run: |
          cd backend
          python -m py_compile app/main.py
          python -m py_compile app/api/v1/api.py
          python -m py_compile app/services/whatsapp_service.py
          python -m py_compile app/services/whatsapp_flow.py
          echo "✅ No syntax errors found!"

      # Push successful hone ka confirmation
      - name: Deploy Success Notification
        run: |
          echo "✅ Code pushed successfully!"
          echo "👉 Ab laptop pe restart_bot.bat run karo"
          echo "👉 Bot automatically latest code le lega"
